sutta: monks that monk who abuses and reviles men that lead the holy life who rails at aryans 5 disadvantages may be expected for him what 5 either he merits expulsion a definite hindrance or he commits a foul offense or he is stricken by a grievous disease or illness or he dies muddled in thought and on the breaking up of the body after death he arises in the wayward way the ill way the abyss hell monks that monk who abuses and reviles men that lead the holy life who rails at aryans these 5 advantages may be expected for him and this suta not only concerns monks who abuse aryans and also concerns lay persons who abuse aryans in 1 of the earliest utters be retina chapter of the force and the buddha said there are 4 fields of merit and 4 fields of the merit 1 is the buddha the second 1 is disciples of the buddha probably meaning monks and nuns and then mother and father in other words we should be very careful in our conduct towards these 4 kinds of persons now it is very difficult to recognize an arya and because the buddha said it takes a long time to know a person so concerning monks and nuns now we should be very careful be very careful not to develop hatred towards any particular monk or none uh the nexus is
